allow: Bash(python -c "import torch; print\(''CUDA:'', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\(''GPU:'', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else ''N/A''\); print\(''GPU count:'', torch.cuda.device_count\(\)\); import os; print\(''CPU cores:'', os.cpu_count\(\)\); print\(''torch threads:'', torch.get_num_threads\(\)\); print\(''torch interop threads:'', torch.get_num_interop_threads\(\)\)")
